name: hermes-profile-architecture
abstract: Comprehensive reference for Hermes Agent profiles — multi-profile isolation model, creation and lifecycle, HERMES_HOME resolution, CLI subcommands, config.yaml and SOUL.md, wrapper aliases, sticky active profile, profile descriptions and kanban orchestrator, export/import, rename, alias management, profile-scoped auth and credential shadowing, profile distributions (install/update/info), gateway multiplexing, and the s6 container service model.
